title: Possible Identity of Moon Giant
wikitext:
[]: Possible Identity of Moon Giant Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 01, 2007 10:02 am This starts off with a split from the Data File book's thread. CitizenGeek wrote: The new LCL plant looks infinitely cooler than the one in the original series. Who's that standing, seemingly naked, in front of Lilith?

[]: Post by CitizenGeek » Thu Nov 01, 2007 10:07 am Reichu wrote: CitizenGeek wrote: The new LCL plant looks infinitely cooler than the one in the original series. Who's that standing, seemingly naked, in front of Lilith?

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 01, 2007 10:12 am CitizenGeek wrote: Who/what is it, then?

[]: Post by CitizenGeek » Thu Nov 01, 2007 10:16 am Reichu wrote: Adam or someone we don't know about yet. As far as I know, we have to wait for further info.

[]: Post by Squiggy » Thu Nov 01, 2007 11:58 am I'm still giggling on the inside at the thought of a "SECRET MOON BASE"

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 01, 2007 12:10 pm CitizenGeek wrote: If it is Adam, it sure don't look much like them Evas.

[]: Post by CitizenGeek » Thu Nov 01, 2007 12:13 pm Reichu wrote: CitizenGeek wrote: If it is Adam, it sure don't look much like them Evas.

[]: Post by CtHuLhU » Thu Nov 01, 2007 1:26 pm ... an unidentified white giant on the "Moon Base".

[]: Post by Rodeo » Thu Nov 01, 2007 3:02 pm Lilith being excavated on the moon? That was my initial reaction. And since I can't read the text and/or is not sufficently informed on the matter, my thought stands. I mean it looks just like her, except she's in a very bad condition.

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 01, 2007 3:17 pm Rodeo wrote: <snip> I mean it looks just like her, except she's in a very bad condition.

[]: Post by Squiggy » Thu Nov 01, 2007 3:36 pm My theory is that the giant is Kowarus Eva Unit and it looks like Lilith because it was probably born from Lilith like Unit 01. Unit 01 will probably look more like Lilith this time as well because IIRC there was a screen shot of Unit 01s hand and it looked pale white rather than dark brown.

[]: Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Nov 01, 2007 3:52 pm That mark on the chest the giant has, can't be from the Lance of Longinus, can it?

[]: Post by Rodeo » Thu Nov 01, 2007 4:26 pm Reichu wrote: Well, problem is, if Lilith's on the Moon, then you've got a blobby white thing that's NOT Lilith in Terminal Dogma oozing LCL with lots of little legs sprouting out where actual legs should be. Unless she's doing the Quantum Magic thing and appearing in two different places simultaneously in two unique conditions. Or maybe the thing on the Moon is the undisclosed Third Angel (Sachiel was bumped up to Fourth). Or a Lilith clone. And/or Eva-06. Or something else altogether.

[]: Post by Seele00TextOnly » Thu Nov 01, 2007 6:18 pm Rodeo wrote: It seems strange to me that there would be white giant (Adam or one of the other Adams) copying Lilith's trademark mask.

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 02, 2007 5:26 pm @Seele 00/Rodeo: Since Kaworu has been seeing floating Seele monoliths in there, having an image of (possibly) Gehirn-era Lilith "projected" via the same technology seems like it could work. Though it makes one wonder (A) why, and (B) if Lilith, why they'd swap her mask later (the giant in Terminal Dogma has been observed with a different one). And the mysterious red stuff. Is that really "LCL", or is it supposed to be the Angel equivalent that they've fashioned for Rebuild? (Core destroyed --> soul leaves body --> body goes sploosh.) Hmm, this is a little offtopic.

[]: Post by marmotgirl » Fri Nov 02, 2007 6:06 pm Reichu wrote: Since Kaworu has been seeing floating Seele monoliths in there, having an image of (possibly) Gehirn-era Lilith "projected" via the same technology seems like it could work. Though it makes one wonder (A) why, and (B) if Lilith, why they'd swap her mask later (the giant in Terminal Dogma has been observed with a different one).

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 02, 2007 7:54 pm marmotgirl wrote: ...and, most important of all, (C) does he get cable?

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri Nov 02, 2007 11:39 pm Squiggy wrote: My theory is that the giant is Kowarus Eva Unit.

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 02, 2007 11:48 pm NAveryW wrote: That's a pretty interesting theory. I like it.

[]: Post by Squiggy » Wed Nov 07, 2007 11:22 am UrsusArctos wrote: Brrr...freaky! Lilith's legs resemble a Tree of Life now. Hahahaha...now we have a good reason why GNR's eyes like that! The Moon Giant is probably the unnamed Third Angel IMHO, but I did notice a vague pattern in the mask, sort of like Eva-05 or 06. Whatever the case, it looks a lot like TMA-1 from 2001: A Space Odessey. No idea if Nick has that one with him.
